user.title: Configure zone
user.description: Step {step} — give the zone a name and optionally link a climate entity (4 steps total).

sensors.title: Link sensors
sensors.description: Step {step} — link available sensors. All fields are optional.

data.fan_entity: Exhaust fan / ventilation (fan or number entity)
data.window_temp_min: Minimum outdoor temperature to open windows (°C)
data.window_temp_max: Maximum outdoor temperature to open windows (°C)

covers.title: Covers and windows
covers.description: Step {step} — link blinds / shutters and automated windows. Both optional.

curtains.title: Link curtains
curtains.description:
Step {step} — optionally link a curtain to each window ({window_count} window(s) configured).

If a curtain is nearly closed the window will not open. When a window opens, the curtain is raised to the minimum opening percentage.

data.curtain_min_open: Minimum curtain opening when window is open (%)
